productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style Notecarlton london gives slip-ons a season update. We simply love this simply designed pair. Style them with tonal chinos, a tee and a blazer for off-duty occasions. A super-comfy shoe with a slip-on styling, it's just right for this summer (which will last upto the next summer!)Product Details Brown tapering toed slip-on shoeHas elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongueUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel, has grooves all overOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
